title: Enum value not made sized when enum sized

features.name: enum typedef with explicit packed size in concatenation
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with explicit packed array size (logic[N:0]) used in a concatenation with explicit casting on enum values
features.snippet:
typedef enum logic[2:0] {P=0, W, E, N, S} Dirs;
localparam [59:0] SEQ = {LEN'(N), LEN'(E), LEN'(W), LEN'(P)};

features.name: enum values used with explicit sizing cast in concatenation
features.description: Code should include enum values explicitly cast with a size parameter in a concatenation expression
features.snippet:
localparam LEN = 3;
localparam [59:0] SEQ = {LEN'(N), LEN'(E), LEN'(W), LEN'(P), LEN'(S), LEN'(E)};

features.name: enum typedef with sized base type causing unsized warning in concatenation
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with a sized base type where enum values generate WIDTHCONCAT warnings when used in concatenations despite having implicit sizing from typedef
features.snippet:
typedef enum logic[2:0] {P=0, W, E, N, S} Dirs;
localparam [59:0] SEQ = {3'(N), 3'(E), 3'(W), 3'(P)};
